details.productUrlName: Crop Rotation JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land.
Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Life comes at a cost, but steward it well and you will be repaid manyfold."
—Lisette, Witherbloom dean
